name: Buttermilk Biscuits with Tomato Gravy
recipeInstructions:
BISCUITS
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add buttermilk; stir until a dough forms (the dough will be sticky).
4. Turn off heat source and gently knead dough once to incorporate air.
5. Roll out and cut with a biscuit cutter; place biscuits on a greased baking sheet with sides touching.
6. Brush biscuits with melted butter.
7. Bake at 450°F for 10-12 minutes or until tops and bottoms are light brown.
GRAVY
1. Meanwhile, peel and cut tomatoes into a bowl, reserving the juice.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Gradually add flour, stirring until it forms a paste (browned roux).
4. Slowly add water, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
5. Stir in tomatoes and reserved juice; bring mixture to a simmer.
6. Gradually whisk in milk, salt, and pepper until combined.
7. Simmer for 15 minutes or until thickened.
Serve over hot biscuits. Yield: about 10 biscuits and 3 cups gravy.
